artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a tarnished brass collection plate held aloft on bone-pale fingertips, brimming with coins and glinting under a cold gold halo of light, a thin curl of incense smoke rising behind it against a blood-dark revival sky. It comes around twice, the second time not optional. The gleaming plate sits high and central in the wide frame, candlelight below. Wide 4:3 landscape, Orzhov bone-and-black palette, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Collection Plate
text:
{T}: Add {W} or {B}. Pass the plate.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice Collection Plate: You gain 3 life and remove a doom counter from the Doomsday Clock. The collection is complete; the rapture may begin.
flavorText: It comes around twice. The second time is not optional.
